source.description: Microsoft Azure Virtual Desktop Activities Pack
source.tags: UiPathActivities Azure WVD WindowsVirtualDesktop VDI VirtualDesktop Cloud

activities.displayName: Assign Users and Groups to Application Group
activities.description: Assigns users and groups to an application group.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Application Groups

activities.description: Performs an activity or a series of activities on each application group, in the current subscription, that matches the filter criteria.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Application Groups

activities.description: Gets details about an application group.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Application Groups

activities.displayName: Remove Users and Groups from Application Group
activities.description: Removes users and groups from an application group.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Application Groups

activities.description: Connects to Azure Virtual Desktop and provides a scope for other Azure Virtual Desktop activities.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop

activities.displayName: Add Virtual Machine to Host Pool
activities.description: Adds an existing Azure virtual machine to the specified host pool.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Host Pools

activities.description: Creates a new host pool. A default desktop application group is created by the activity.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Host Pools

activities.description: Deletes a host pool.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Host Pools

activities.description: Performs an activity or a series of activities on each host pool in the current subscription.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Host Pools

activities.description: Gets details about a host pool.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Host Pools

activities.description: Updates a host pool.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Host Pools

activities.description: Deletes a session host.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Session Hosts

activities.description: Performs an activity or a series of activities on each session host within the specified host pool.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Session Hosts

activities.description: Gets details about a session host within the specified host pool.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Session Hosts

activities.description: Updates a session host.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Session Hosts

activities.description: Deletes (logs off) a user session.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.User Sessions

activities.description: Disconnects a user session.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.User Sessions

activities.description: Performs an activity or a series of activities on each user session within a specified session host.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.User Sessions

activities.description: Sends a message to a user session.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.User Sessions

activities.description: Creates a new workspace.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Workspaces

activities.description: Deletes a workspace.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Workspaces

activities.description: Performs an activity or a series of activities on each workspace, in the current subscription, that matches the filter criteria.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Workspaces

activities.description: Gets details about a workspace.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Workspaces

activities.description: Updates a workspace.
activities.category: Desktop and App Virtualization.Azure Virtual Desktop.Workspaces
